emails.subject: Re: deal 470677
emails.body: Re: deal 470677 Mike Driscoll input the deal for Swerzbin. He's sure it's Mid-C, because he wasn't trading any COB yesterday. He's having Prebon check their tapes, and they should get back to us in a minute. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/01/2000 08:46 AM
